questionHtml:
A particle is confined within a nucleus. What is the order of magnitude of the uncertainty in the momentum of the particle?

A. 10–10 N s

B. 10–15 N s

C. 10–20 N s

D. 10–25 N s

meta.title: A particle is confined within a nucleus. What is the order of magnitude of the uncertainty in the momentum of the particle? A. 10–10 N s B. 10–15 N s C. 10–20 N s D. 10–25 N s
